nasb.text: A lazy man does not roast his prey, But the precious possession of a man is diligence.

esv.text: Whoever is slothful will not roast his game, but the diligent man will get precious wealth.

cnv.text: 懶惰的人不去燒烤他的獵物， 殷勤的人卻得寶貴的財物。

ccb.text: 懒汉不烤猎物， 勤快人得资财。

csbs.text: 懒散的人连自己的猎物也不烤， 殷勤的人却得宝贵的财物。
